solution: 
```cpp
class Solution {
public:
    bool divisorGame(int n) {
        return n % 2 == 0;
    }
};
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: <The problem can be solved by observing a pattern: if n is even, Alice can always win by choosing optimal moves. If n is odd, Bob can always win. This is based on the observation that for even n, Alice can always force the game into an odd state for Bob, and vice versa. The solution simply checks if n is even.>
